categories.description: Input stream behavior and frame processing basics.
Model path and confidence filtering for person detection.
Tracker persistence and output smoothness tuning.
Crowd safety checks, restricted-zone and anomaly triggers.
Logging frequency for processed data points.

FRAME_WIDTH.description: Target width used when resizing frames before inference.

YOLO_CONFIDENCE.description: Minimum confidence required to keep person detections.

STREAM_JPEG_QUALITY.description: JPEG quality used for stream encoding (1-100).

TRACK_MAX_AGE.description: Maximum tracker age before stale tracks are dropped.

MIN_CROWD_FOR_ANALYSIS.description: Minimum people count required for certain crowd analysis views.

RESTRICTED_ZONE.description: Polygon points defining the restricted area as [[x,y], ...].

CHECK_ABNORMAL.description: Enables kinetic-energy based abnormal movement detection.

MIN_PERSONS_ABNORMAL.description: Minimum people required before abnormal ratio checks are applied.

ENERGY_THRESHOLD.description: Energy threshold to classify an individual as abnormal.

ABNORMAL_RATIO_THRESHOLD.description: Crowd ratio threshold that triggers abnormal crowd alert.

DATA_RECORD_RATE.description: How many processed data points are recorded per second.
